content.en:
100,000 Realms!

The Holy Son of Wuling frowned, the top domain realm is not worth much in his eyes, any domain ancestor can build one with a little resources, but it takes some time to build a domain realm, and it takes a lot of time to build a hundred thousand domain realms!

"Ten thousand realms, how's that?"

The Son of Wuling bargained.

"No, 100,000 is 100,000!" Ye Tian said firmly.

Nowadays, although the development of the Daoshan Boundary is good, there are too few domain boundaries, and the entire Daoshan Boundary is very empty, and many territories are empty.

But the construction of the domain boundary requires the help of the domain ancestors, and the domain ancestors of the human race are not willing to waste resources to build the domain boundary, because the Xuanxu Holy Realm is not known how many times better than the regional boundary, and any small place here is far more valuable than the domain boundary.

And Ye Tian was naturally too lazy to build the domain realm, he didn't have so much spare time.

Now, the domain ancestors of the Dark Sacred Realm are here, so they naturally want to make more use of them, let them build more domain realms, and in the future, they can transfer a group of mortals into these domain realms, after all, it is impossible for the human race to only stay in the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and other regions are also involved and develop their strength.

100,000 domain realms are actually not enough, but if the Wuling Holy Son is allowed to build too many domain realms, the other party will definitely not do it.

Although the 100,000 domain realms would also embarrass the Wuling Holy Son, Ye Tian believed that the Wuling Holy Son would definitely agree in the end.

At this time, the Holy Son of Wuling hesitated.

But in the end, he still nodded and agreed, "Okay, I'm willing to build 100,000 domain realms." However, I want to enter the Soul Saint Realm while building, how about it?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

After reaching the agreement, the Holy Son of Wuling was still relatively happy, at least this time the goal was preliminarily achieved.

In the following days, Ye Tian saw a lot of domain ancestors from the Dark Holy Domain, and they all made a lot of requests, some of them agreed, but some of them did not.

Until the end, Ye Tian no longer allowed foreign domain ancestors to enter the Soul Saint Realm to participate in enlightenment and cultivation, because the quota was enough, and if he let people in again, it would give the Soul Saint Realm a burden.

In fact, allowing a large number of Domain Ancestors to enter the Soul Saint Realm to cultivate like Ye Tian would increase the load on the Soul Saint Realm, which would cause the Soul Saint Realm to give birth to the Soul Saint Realm Flower for a longer period of time.

Other forces basically wouldn't do this, but Ye Tian didn't care.

He was deeply aware of the potential of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and a mere Soul Saint Realm was nothing.

Now, he used this Soul Saint Realm to continuously squeeze the use value of the Dark Saint Domain Ancestors, thereby strengthening the human race.

Even if the Soul Saint Realm was gone, he wouldn't be heartbroken.

The years passed slowly, and with the help of many Dark Sacred Domain Domain Ancestors, the Terran Race developed more and more, and built a large number of Domain Boundaries in many Void Domains in the Daoshan Realm, and countless Terran Races moved to these Domain Realms.

Moreover, the geniuses of the human race were born one by one, and the human race born in the Xuanxu Holy Realm was not bad in talent.

There is no shortage of resources, no shortage of strong guidance, and no shortage of geniuses.

Under such circumstances, the domain ancestors of the human race sprung up wildly.

Even the domain ancestors from the Battle Gate had to admit that the potential of the human race was very high, and if they entered the Dark Sacred Domain in the future, they would also be qualified to become a powerful cultivation race.

-----------------

"Alliance leader, this is the latest intelligence gathered!"

The Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor bent down and stood beside Ye Tian, took out an intelligence document, and handed it to Ye Tian.

Today's Ten Thousand Realms Domain Ancestor has interpreted what it means to be a dog's leg, and he has already become Ye Tian's best little brother, and he also followed Ye Tian's instructions to investigate the situation of those domain ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain.

Ye Tian took a look at the information and immediately understood the current situation.

"I didn't expect so many domain ancestors to come!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Among them, many Domain Ancestors didn't look for him at all, and they didn't make any moves, but were waiting for something.

Ye Tian knew very well what they were waiting for, it must be waiting for the Soul Saint Realm Flower.

Once you get the Soul Saint Realm Flower, you will be able to become an invincible domain ancestor one hundred percent.

Under normal circumstances, it would take an incomparably long time for the Soul Saint Realm Flower to be born, but the Soul Saint Realm had just been born, and the first Soul Saint Realm Flower should not take endless long years, maybe it would take 100 million or hundreds of millions of years to be born.

For those Supreme Domain Ancestors, a few hundred million years was nothing at all, just a small retreat.

So, they can afford to wait!

It is conceivable that once the Soul Saint Realm Flower is born in the Soul Saint Realm, the battle will be very tragic at that time.

However, what they didn't know was that Ye Tian was able to exert a very terrifying combat power in the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

After all, even if an ordinary domain ancestor becomes the Lord of the Holy Realm, the strength he exerts will not be too strong, at most it will double his combat power.

But the Xuanxu Holy Realm was created by the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, and Ye Tian was the master of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, so he was naturally able to use the Creation Mixed Yuan Well and the Xuanxu Holy Realm to burst out with incomparably terrifying combat power.

"The next goal is to break through to the top domain ancestor realm first, once I break through to the top domain ancestor realm, my strength will get a surge!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, Ye Tian worked very hard to refine his soul, cultivating the pure power of the Endless Domain Law, striving to raise his strength to the extreme of the Elite Domain Ancestor as soon as possible, and then to impact the top Domain Ancestor level.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, 80 million years passed.

this day.

With the help of the Xuanxu Saint Realm and the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, Ye Tian had made great progress in the cultivation of the Endless Domain Method, and the domain body and domain power had been refined to the extreme, and the soul had also been refined to the current limit level with the help of the Soul Saint Realm.

In other words, Ye Tian can break through.

"Then break through!"

Ye Tian began to impact the top domain ancestor realm.

Rumble!!!!!

With the help of the Endless Domain Method, Ye Tian's elite domain began to transform, evolving towards the top domain body.

Countless amounts of energy poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him complete the breakthrough.

Under normal circumstances, if a domain ancestor breaks through, the movement must be very large.

And Ye Tiannai was the master of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, so he let the origin of the Xuanxu Saint Realm cover the breakthrough aura for himself, so no one else knew that he was impacting the top domain ancestor realm.

This kind of caution is necessary!

After all, there were too many Domain Ancestors from the Dark Sacred Domain this time, and many of them were afraid that they all had a grudge against the Battle Gate, in case any of the strongest Domain Ancestors attacked him when he broke through, even if he was not his opponent, it would interfere with his breakthrough, causing him to fail to break through, thus affecting the foundation problem.

Therefore, he had to be careful!
